overview: A premium futuristic AI engineer portfolio for A.Shafiq Ahamed — dark cyberpunk UI with glassmorphism, neon gradients, Three.js particle background, and Framer Motion animations. Features a full backend CMS with admin dashboard, projects/skills/certs management, contact form, GitHub API integration, AI chatbot, resume upload, and visitor analytics.
features: Dark cyberpunk UI with glassmorphism, neon blue/purple/cyan gradients, and animated particle background
9 portfolio sections: Hero, About, Skills, Projects, Certifications, Experience, Resume, Contact, Footer
Admin dashboard for managing all portfolio content (projects, skills, certifications, messages)
Contact form with backend storage, GitHub API stats integration, and AI chatbot assistant
Resume upload and download via file storage, with visitor analytics tracking
Fully responsive mobile-first layout with custom cursor glow and Framer Motion animations
